query: (cat:cs.CV OR cat:eess.IV OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.MM OR cat:stat.ML) AND submittedDate:[202602080000 TO 202602082359]

papers.title: MMLSv2: A Multimodal Dataset for Martian Landslide Detection in Remote Sensing Imagery
papers.summary: We present MMLSv2, a dataset for landslide segmentation on Martian surfaces. MMLSv2 consists of multimodal imagery with seven bands: RGB, digital elevation model, slope, thermal inertia, and grayscale channels. MMLSv2 comprises 664 images distributed across training, validation, and test splits. In addition, an isolated test set of 276 images from a geographically disjoint region from the base dataset is released to evaluate spatial generalization. Experiments conducted with multiple segmentation models show that the dataset supports stable training and achieves competitive performance, while still posing challenges in fragmented, elongated, and small-scale landslide regions. Evaluation on the isolated test set leads to a noticeable performance drop, indicating increased difficulty and highlighting its value for assessing model robustness and generalization beyond standard in-distribution settings. Dataset will be available at: https://github.com/MAIN-Lab/MMLS_v2
papers.title_zh: MMLSv2：遥感图像中火星滑坡检测的多模态数据集
papers.summary_zh: 我们提出了 MMLSv2，这是一个用于火星表面滑坡分割的数据集。 MMLSv2 由具有七个波段的多模态图像组成：RGB、数字高程模型、坡度、热惯性和灰度通道。 MMLSv2 包含分布在训练、验证和测试部分的 664 个图像。此外，还发布了来自基础数据集地理上不相交区域的 276 张图像的独立测试集，以评估空间泛化。使用多个分割模型进行的实验表明，该数据集支持稳定的训练并取得了有竞争力的性能，同时在碎片化、细长和小规模的滑坡区域仍然构成了挑战。对孤立测试集的评估会导致性能显着下降，这表明难度增加，并突出了其对于评估模型稳健性和超出标准分布设置的泛化性的价值。数据集将在以下位置提供：https://github.com/MAIN-Lab/MMLS_v2

papers.title: TAAM:Inductive Graph-Class Incremental Learning with Task-Aware Adaptive Modulation
papers.summary: Graph Continual Learning (GCL) aims to solve the challenges of streaming graph data. However, current methods often depend on replay-based strategies, which raise concerns like memory limits and privacy issues, while also struggling to resolve the stability-plasticity dilemma. In this paper, we suggest that lightweight, task-specific modules can effectively guide the reasoning process of a fixed GNN backbone. Based on this idea, we propose Task-Aware Adaptive Modulation (TAAM). The key component of TAAM is its lightweight Neural Synapse Modulators (NSMs). For each new task, a dedicated NSM is trained and then frozen, acting as an "expert module." These modules perform detailed, node-attentive adaptive modulation on the computational flow of a shared GNN backbone. This setup ensures that new knowledge is kept within compact, task-specific modules, naturally preventing catastrophic forgetting without using any data replay. Additionally, to address the important challenge of unknown task IDs in real-world scenarios, we propose and theoretically prove a novel method named Anchored Multi-hop Propagation (AMP). Notably, we find that existing GCL benchmarks have flaws that can cause data leakage and biased evaluations. Therefore, we conduct all experiments in a more rigorous inductive learning scenario. Extensive experiments show that TAAM comprehensively outperforms state-of-the-art methods across eight datasets. Code and Datasets are available at: https://github.com/1iuJT/TAAM_AAMAS2026.
papers.title_zh: TAAM：具有任务感知自适应调制的归纳图类增量学习
papers.summary_zh: 图持续学习（GCL）旨在解决流图数据的挑战。然而，当前的方法通常依赖于基于重放的策略，这引发了内存限制和隐私问题等问题，同时也难以解决稳定性-可塑性困境。在本文中，我们建议轻量级的、特定于任务的模块可以有效地指导固定 GNN 主干的推理过程。基于这个想法，我们提出了任务感知自适应调制（TAAM）。 TAAM 的关键组件是其轻量级神经突触调制器 (NSM)。对于每一个新任务，都会训练一个专用的 NSM，然后将其冻结，充当“专家模块”。这些模块对共享 GNN 主干的计算流执行详细的、节点关注的自适应调制。这种设置确保新知识保存在紧凑的、特定于任务的模块中，自然地防止灾难性遗忘，而无需使用任何数据重放。此外，为了解决现实场景中未知任务 ID 的重要挑战，我们提出并在理论上证明了一种名为锚定多跳传播（AMP）的新方法。值得注意的是，我们发现现有的 GCL 基准测试存在缺陷，可能导致数据泄露和评估偏差。因此，我们在更严格的归纳学习场景中进行所有实验。大量实验表明，TAAM 在八个数据集上全面优于最先进的方法。代码和数据集位于：https://github.com/1iuJT/TAAM_AAMAS2026。

papers.title: Building Damage Detection using Satellite Images and Patch-Based Transformer Methods
papers.summary: Rapid building damage assessment is critical for post-disaster response. Damage classification models built on satellite imagery provide a scalable means of obtaining situational awareness. However, label noise and severe class imbalance in satellite data create major challenges. The xBD dataset offers a standardized benchmark for building-level damage across diverse geographic regions. In this study, we evaluate Vision Transformer (ViT) model performance on the xBD dataset, specifically investigating how these models distinguish between types of structural damage when training on noisy, imbalanced data. In this study, we specifically evaluate DINOv2-small and DeiT for multi-class damage classification. We propose a targeted patch-based pre-processing pipeline to isolate structural features and minimize background noise in training. We adopt a frozen-head fine-tuning strategy to keep computational requirements manageable. Model performance is evaluated through accuracy, precision, recall, and macro-averaged F1 scores. We show that small ViT architectures with our novel training method achieves competitive macro-averaged F1 relative to prior CNN baselines for disaster classification.
papers.title_zh: 使用卫星图像和基于补丁的变压器方法进行建筑物损坏检测
papers.summary_zh: 快速建筑受损评估对于灾后响应至关重要。基于卫星图像构建的损害分类模型提供了一种获取态势感知的可扩展方法。然而，卫星数据中的标签噪声和严重的类别不平衡带来了重大挑战。 xBD 数据集为不同地理区域的建筑物级别损坏提供了标准化基准。在本研究中，我们评估了 xBD 数据集上的 Vision Transformer (ViT) 模型性能，特别研究了这些模型在对噪声、不平衡数据进行训练时如何区分结构损坏的类型。在本研究中，我们专门评估了 DINOv2-small 和 DeiT 的多类损伤分类。我们提出了一种有针对性的基于补丁的预处理管道，以隔离结构特征并最大限度地减少训练中的背景噪声。我们采用冻结头微调策略来保持计算需求的可控性。模型性能通过准确度、精确度、召回率和宏观平均 F1 分数进行评估。我们展示了采用我们新颖的训练方法的小型 ViT 架构相对于之前用于灾难分类的 CNN 基线，实现了有竞争力的宏观平均 F1。

papers.title: Graph-based Semi-Supervised Learning via Maximum Discrimination
papers.summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) addresses the critical challenge of training accurate models when labeled data is scarce but unlabeled data is abundant. Graph-based SSL (GSSL) has emerged as a popular framework that captures data structure through graph representations. Classic graph SSL methods, such as Label Propagation and Label Spreading, aim to compute low-dimensional representations where points with the same labels are close in representation space. Although often effective, these methods can be suboptimal on data with complex label distributions. In our work, we develop AUC-spec, a graph approach that computes a low-dimensional representation that maximizes class separation. We compute this representation by optimizing the Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) as estimated via the labeled points. We provide a detailed analysis of our approach under a product-of-manifold model, and show that the required number of labeled points for AUC-spec is polynomial in the model parameters. Empirically, we show that AUC-spec balances class separation with graph smoothness. It demonstrates competitive results on synthetic and real-world datasets while maintaining computational efficiency comparable to the field's classic and state-of-the-art methods.
papers.title_zh: 通过最大辨别力的基于图的半监督学习
papers.summary_zh: 半监督学习 (SSL) 解决了当标记数据稀缺但未标记数据丰富时训练准确模型的关键挑战。基于图的 SSL (GSSL) 已成为一种流行的框架，它通过图表示来捕获数据结构。经典的图 SSL 方法，例如标签传播和标签传播，旨在计算具有相同标签的点在表示空间中接近的低维表示。尽管通常有效，但这些方法对于具有复杂标签分布的数据可能不是最佳的。在我们的工作中，我们开发了 AUC-spec，这是一种计算低维表示的图方法，可最大化类分离。我们通过优化通过标记点估计的 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC) 来计算此表示。我们在流形乘积模型下对我们的方法进行了详细分析，并表明 AUC-spec 所需的标记点数量是模型参数中的多项式。根据经验，我们表明 AUC-spec 平衡了类别分离和图形平滑度。它在合成数据集和真实数据集上展示了具有竞争力的结果，同时保持了与该领域的经典和最先进方法相当的计算效率。

papers.title: Multi-encoder ConvNeXt Network with Smooth Attentional Feature Fusion for Multispectral Semantic Segmentation
papers.summary: This work proposes MeCSAFNet, a multi-branch encoder-decoder architecture for land cover segmentation in multispectral imagery. The model separately processes visible and non-visible channels through dual ConvNeXt encoders, followed by individual decoders that reconstruct spatial information. A dedicated fusion decoder integrates intermediate features at multiple scales, combining fine spatial cues with high-level spectral representations. The feature fusion is further enhanced with CBAM attention, and the ASAU activation function contributes to stable and efficient optimization. The model is designed to process different spectral configurations, including a 4-channel (4c) input combining RGB and NIR bands, as well as a 6-channel (6c) input incorporating NDVI and NDWI indices. Experiments on the Five-Billion-Pixels (FBP) and Potsdam datasets demonstrate significant performance gains. On FBP, MeCSAFNet-base (6c) surpasses U-Net (4c) by +19.21%, U-Net (6c) by +14.72%, SegFormer (4c) by +19.62%, and SegFormer (6c) by +14.74% in mIoU. On Potsdam, MeCSAFNet-large (4c) improves over DeepLabV3+ (4c) by +6.48%, DeepLabV3+ (6c) by +5.85%, SegFormer (4c) by +9.11%, and SegFormer (6c) by +4.80% in mIoU. The model also achieves consistent gains over several recent state-of-the-art approaches. Moreover, compact variants of MeCSAFNet deliver notable performance with lower training time and reduced inference cost, supporting their deployment in resource-constrained environments.
papers.comment: This is an extended version of the study presented at IEEE SoutheastCon2025. It presents substantial new content and original contributions beyond the previous version, including an expanded and enhanced background, new architectural refinements, additional experiments conducted on a broader range of datasets and experimental scenarios, and a more comprehensive analysis of results
papers.title_zh: 具有平滑注意特征融合的多编码器 ConvNeXt 网络，用于多光谱语义分割
papers.summary_zh: 这项工作提出了 MeCSAFNet，一种用于多光谱图像中土地覆盖分割的多分支编码器-解码器架构。该模型通过双 ConvNeXt 编码器分别处理可见和不可见通道，然后是重建空间信息的单独解码器。专用的融合解码器集成了多个尺度的中间特征，将精细的空间线索与高级光谱表示相结合。通过CBAM注意力进一步增强特征融合，ASAU激活函数有助于稳定高效的优化。该模型旨在处理不同的光谱配置，包括结合 RGB 和 NIR 波段的 4 通道 (4c) 输入，以及结合 NDVI 和 NDWI 指数的 6 通道 (6c) 输入。在 50 亿像素 (FBP) 和 Potsdam 数据集上进行的实验显示出显着的性能提升。在 FBP 上，MeCSAFNet-base (6c) 的 mIoU 超过 U-Net (4c) +19.21%，U-Net (6c) +14.72%，SegFormer (4c) +19.62%，SegFormer (6c) +14.74%。在波茨坦，MeCSAFNet-large (4c) 的 mIoU 比 DeepLabV3+ (4c) 提高了 +6.48%，DeepLabV3+ (6c) 提高了 +5.85%，SegFormer (4c) 提高了 +9.11%，SegFormer (6c) 提高了 +4.80%。该模型还比最近的几种最先进的方法取得了一致的成果。此外，MeCSAFNet 的紧凑变体可提供显着的性能、较短的训练时间和较低的推理成本，支持其在资源有限的环境中的部署。

papers.title: Scalable Adaptation of 3D Geometric Foundation Models via Weak Supervision from Internet Video
papers.summary: Geometric foundation models show promise in 3D reconstruction, yet their progress is severely constrained by the scarcity of diverse, large-scale 3D annotations. While Internet videos offer virtually unlimited raw data, utilizing them as a scaling source for geometric learning is challenging due to the absence of ground-truth geometry and the presence of observational noise. To address this, we propose SAGE, a framework for Scalable Adaptation of GEometric foundation models from raw video streams. SAGE leverages a hierarchical mining pipeline to transform videos into training trajectories and hybrid supervision: (1) Informative training trajectory selection; (2) Sparse Geometric Anchoring via SfM point clouds for global structural guidance; and (3) Dense Differentiable Consistency via 3D Gaussian rendering for multi-view constraints. To prevent catastrophic forgetting, we introduce a regularization strategy using anchor data. Extensive experiments show that SAGE significantly enhances zero-shot generalization, reducing Chamfer Distance by 20-42% on unseen benchmarks (7Scenes, TUM-RGBD, Matterport3D) compared to state-of-the-art baselines. To our knowledge, SAGE pioneers the adaptation of geometric foundation models via Internet video, establishing a scalable paradigm for general-purpose 3D learning.
papers.title_zh: 通过互联网视频的弱监督对 3D 几何基础模型进行可扩展的适应
papers.summary_zh: 几何基础模型在 3D 重建方面显示出良好的前景，但其进展受到缺乏多样化、大规模 3D 注释的严重限制。虽然互联网视频提供了几乎无限的原始数据，但由于缺乏地面实况几何且存在观察噪声，将它们用作几何学习的缩放源具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 SAGE，一个用于对原始视频流的几何基础模型进行可扩展适应的框架。 SAGE 利用分层挖掘管道将视频转换为训练轨迹和混合监督：（1）信息丰富的训练轨迹选择； (2) 通过 SfM 点云进行稀疏几何锚定，用于全局结构指导； (3) 通过 3D 高斯渲染实现多视图约束的密集可微一致性。为了防止灾难性遗忘，我们引入了使用锚数据的正则化策略。大量实验表明，SAGE 显着增强了零样本泛化能力，与最先进的基准相比，在未见过的基准（7Scenes、TUM-RGBD、Matterport3D）上，倒角距离减少了 20-42%。据我们所知，SAGE 率先通过互联网视频改编几何基础模型，为通用 3D 学习建立了可扩展的范例。

papers.title: Open-Text Aerial Detection: A Unified Framework For Aerial Visual Grounding And Detection
papers.summary: Open-Vocabulary Aerial Detection (OVAD) and Remote Sensing Visual Grounding (RSVG) have emerged as two key paradigms for aerial scene understanding. However, each paradigm suffers from inherent limitations when operating in isolation: OVAD is restricted to coarse category-level semantics, while RSVG is structurally limited to single-target localization. These limitations prevent existing methods from simultaneously supporting rich semantic understanding and multi-target detection. To address this, we propose OTA-Det, the first unified framework that bridges both paradigms into a cohesive architecture. Specifically, we introduce a task reformulation strategy that unifies task objectives and supervision mechanisms, enabling joint training across datasets from both paradigms with dense supervision signals. Furthermore, we propose a dense semantic alignment strategy that establishes explicit correspondence at multiple granularities, from holistic expressions to individual attributes, enabling fine-grained semantic understanding. To ensure real-time efficiency, OTA-Det builds upon the RT-DETR architecture, extending it from closed-set detection to open-text detection by introducing several high efficient modules, achieving state-of-the-art performance on six benchmarks spanning both OVAD and RSVG tasks while maintaining real-time inference at 34 FPS.
papers.title_zh: 开放文本空中检测：空中视觉接地和检测的统一框架
papers.summary_zh: 开放词汇空中探测（OVAD）和遥感视觉接地（RSVG）已成为空中场景理解的两个关键范例。然而，每种范式在独立运行时都受到固有的限制：OVAD 仅限于粗略的类别级语义，而 RSVG 在结构上仅限于单目标定位。这些限制使得现有方法无法同时支持丰富的语义理解和多目标检测。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 OTA-Det，这是第一个将两种范式桥接成一个有凝聚力的架构的统一框架。具体来说，我们引入了一种任务重新制定策略，该策略统一了任务目标和监督机制，从而实现了具有密集监督信号的两种范式的跨数据集的联合训练。此外，我们提出了一种密集的语义对齐策​​略，该策略在从整体表达到单个属性的多个粒度上建立明确的对应关系，从而实现细粒度的语义理解。为了确保实时效率，OTA-Det 基于 RT-DETR 架构，通过引入多个高效模块，将其从闭集检测扩展到开放文本检测，在涵盖 OVAD 和 RSVG 任务的六个基准上实现了最先进的性能，同时保持 34 FPS 的实时推理。

papers.title: VideoTemp-o3: Harmonizing Temporal Grounding and Video Understanding in Agentic Thinking-with-Videos
papers.summary: In long-video understanding, conventional uniform frame sampling often fails to capture key visual evidence, leading to degraded performance and increased hallucinations. To address this, recent agentic thinking-with-videos paradigms have emerged, adopting a localize-clip-answer pipeline in which the model actively identifies relevant video segments, performs dense sampling within those clips, and then produces answers. However, existing methods remain inefficient, suffer from weak localization, and adhere to rigid workflows. To solve these issues, we propose VideoTemp-o3, a unified agentic thinking-with-videos framework that jointly models video grounding and question answering. VideoTemp-o3 exhibits strong localization capability, supports on-demand clipping, and can refine inaccurate localizations. Specifically, in the supervised fine-tuning stage, we design a unified masking mechanism that encourages exploration while preventing noise. For reinforcement learning, we introduce dedicated rewards to mitigate reward hacking. Besides, from the data perspective, we develop an effective pipeline to construct high-quality long video grounded QA data, along with a corresponding benchmark for systematic evaluation across various video durations. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves remarkable performance on both long video understanding and grounding.
papers.title_zh: VideoTemp-o3：协调视频主体思维中的时间基础和视频理解
papers.summary_zh: 在长视频理解中，传统的均匀帧采样通常无法捕获关键的视觉证据，导致性能下降和幻觉增加。为了解决这个问题，最近出现了视频代理思维范例，采用本地化剪辑答案管道，其中模型主动识别相关视频片段，在这些剪辑中执行密集采样，然后生成答案。然而，现有方法仍然效率低下，本地化能力薄弱，并且遵循严格的工作流程。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 VideoTemp-o3，这是一个统一的视频代理思维框架，可以对视频基础和问题回答进行联合建模。 VideoTemp-o3具有强大的定位能力，支持按需剪辑，可以修正不准确的定位。具体来说，在监督微调阶段，我们设计了统一的掩蔽机制，鼓励探索，同时防止噪音。对于强化学习，我们引入了专门的奖励来减少奖励黑客行为。此外，从数据的角度来看，我们开发了一个有效的管道来构建高质量的长视频质量保证数据，以及相应的基准来跨不同视频时长进行系统评估。实验结果表明，我们的方法在长视频理解和基础方面都取得了显着的性能。
